data.title: Proven Bitcoin Momentum Indicator Flashes Green, Supporting Analyst $140K-$200K Price Predictions
data.description:
• A key momentum indicator, the MACD histogram, has turned bullish, supporting predictions of a bitcoin rally to $150,000-$200,000.
  • Bitcoin's MACD crossing above zero signals renewed bullish momentum, echoing patterns from mid-2024 and early 2023.

data.title: Chainproof Combats Ethereum ‘Slashing’ Losses With Guaranteed Yearly Yields
data.description:
• Chainproof has launched a new insurance product for Ethereum stakers to protect against slashing and ensure a minimum yearly yield.
  • The product, in partnership with IMA Financial Group, guarantees returns based on the Composite Ether Staking Rate (CESR).

data.title: Telegram Cracks Down on Suspected $8B Chinese Crypto Crime Marketplace Set Up in Colorado
data.description:
• Telegram has shut down thousands of channels linked to suspected Chinese crypto crime marketplaces following a report by blockchain analytics firm Elliptic.
  • The Xinbi Guarantee marketplace, incorporated in Colorado, has processed over $8.4 billion in suspected illicit transactions using Tether's USDT stablecoin since 2022.
  • The U.S. Treasury's Financial Crimes Enforcement Network has designated Huione Group, another major marketplace, as a primary money laundering concern.

data.title: Solana (SOL) Surges 5% on Heavy Volume and Strengthening DeFi Metrics
data.description:
• Solana (SOL) jumps 5% in 24 hours, climbing from $172.53 to $181.39 amid strong volume support and growing DeFi metrics.
  • Geopolitical tensions and trade disputes between major economies create market volatility, with investors seeking refuge in select cryptocurrencies.
  • Solana's DeFi ecosystem shows remarkable growth with total value locked increasing from $7.5 billion to $9.6 billion in May, driving investor confidence.

data.title: JPMorgan’s Kinexys Connects With Public Blockchain on Ondo Chain Testnet Debut
data.description:
• JPMorgan’s Kinexys Digital Payments settled a tokenized Treasury transaction on Ondo Chain’s testnet.
  • The move marks Kinexys’ first move involving a public blockchain network.
  • Chainlink infrastructure was used to enable the cross-chain settlement.

data.title: TRON's TRX Surges 5% as It Overtakes Ethereum in USDT Circulation
data.description:
• TRON (TRX) surges 4.8% in 24 hours, establishing new support at $0.273 after reaching a peak of $0.276.
  • US-China trade tensions ease with recent White House deal, boosting overall market sentiment despite ongoing volatility.
  • TRON officially surpasses Ethereum in total USDT circulation with $73.8 billion, marking a major shift in the stablecoin ecosystem.

data.title: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong Invites Ex-DOGE Staff to Join Crypto Exchange
data.description:
• Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong is offering fast-tracked hiring to former employees of the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE).
  • DOGE aims to streamline federal operations and says it has saved $170 billion so far.
  • Coinbase has supported crypto-friendly political action committees and recently added a Trump campaign advisor to its board.

data.title: Surge in XRP, Dogecoin Futures Bets Signals Speculative Froth
data.description:
• Speculative interest in DOGE and XRP futures is rising sharply, with DOGE futures open interest increasing by 63.9% and XRP by 41.6% in the past week.
  • Despite DOGE's recent price pullback, the surge in futures open interest suggests persistent speculative positioning.
  • The increase in open interest without corresponding price action may indicate elevated risk of sharp liquidations if market sentiment changes.

data.title: Bitcoin Boom Likely as Bond Yields Surge - Yes, You Read That Correctly
data.description:
• Persistently elevated Treasury yields represent fiscal expansion under President Trump, which will likely benefit bitcoin and other assets.
  • Analysts predict fiscal policies will put pressure on the Treasury market, potentially driving the 10-year yield to 6% within 12–18 months.
  • Persistent high yields also indicate rising sovereign risk, potentially increasing bitcoin's appeal as an alternative investment.

data.title: Bitcoin May Be Headed Towards a 2021-Like Double Top
data.description:
• Several data points are indicating a repeat of the 2021 cycle's double top.
  • Weekly RSI is showing bearish divergence while volume continues to drop off across crypto and institutional venues.
  • Bitcoin entered more than a one-year bear market after nearly reaching $70,000 for the second time in 2021.
